Name: -1_taste_bad_like_things
Representative_Docs: ["Bad taste can be different to everyone, for me it would be something I dislike. An example: if I dislike a piece of art and someone else likes it, I would say this person has bad taste in art.  We don't share the same kinds of music, if anything I think he has a horrible taste in music. I feel like music needs to have meaning or have a message. Most of the music he listens to doesn't have any, which makes it hard to identify with. To me he has a poor taste in music, to him maybe not.", 'They like something I don’t like. I don’t know anyone who has bad taste', "Someone who has bad taste in my opinion would mean that my opinions of those tastes are bad. To put simply, the tastes that I dislike would make me think a person who likes them has bad taste. My mother has poor taste. We don't like the same things, therefore my opinion of her likes and tastes are poor."]

Name: 0_taste_bad_think_person
Representative_Docs: ["Bad taste to me usually means someone prefers things that seem ugly or just not good to me.  People with bad taste usually don't like things that are considered to be in good taste by most people. Lisa usually has poor taste.  She seems to limit herself to only a few things that she likes and refuses to even consider something new or different.", "Bad taste would be defined by a lack of manners or behavior not quite up to a certain innate standard that seems to be inborn with me. Being crude, crass or vulgar, for example, would be in low taste to me. I was born and raised in the southern United States , where historically there are behaviors that divide bad and good taste, regardless of any racial group or financial status. Some things just aren't done, or they would be considered tacky. It's weird because I don't remember ever being specifically told what was good and what was not, it was just understood, if that makes any sense.  It's hard to explain this and not feel like a snob. Well, I would have to say yes I know someone who I consider to have bad taste. There is a difference though between someone who doesn't know any better versus someone that knows how to act but ignores that fact. Again, to me taste and style are two different animals. Style can change and evolves, I think but taste is more of a character quality.  And I am a huge snob probably lol, although I would never tell anyone or show in any way that I thought someone acted in bad taste or had bad style either way. That would be in bad taste, in my opinion.", 'When I say that someone has bad taste, it means that in my opinion, the things that person likes is very different from the things I like, so, therefore, they have bad taste. I think that people who have gaudy lawn ornaments have bad taste because in my opinion, it makes their lawns look like a disaster.']

Name: 1_things_just_like_choices
Representative_Docs: ["They like things that are outside the bounds of acceptability or like things that are just plain dumb. I can't think of someone like that off the top of my head.", "They don't care about the type of people or things they associate themselves with. They may not care about materialist things like people who have good taste.  Miley Cyrus comes to mind. She has made poor choices in life and doesn't care what others think of her. She seems to live life as she wants, has not made the best choices in life. Abused alcohol.", 'That their preference in music, art, clothing, movies, etc. is unappealing, NOT interesting, not any fun, not exciting, not likeable, and just not favored in any way. I\'m going to pick one of my past co-workers who used to come to work with mismatched clothing & suits. His clothing looked cheaply made & just not nice to look at & he made good money & wasn\'t poor. His desk was always messy & when we went out to lunch his choices in foods were unappealing & kinda "gross"! I just don\'t think he had good taste in many things.']
